items.title: Your Netflix bill is up 29% in just over a year. It’s time for Washington to step in.
items.description: Netflix is still a Wall Street favorite — and a target for government regulators

items.title: My wife’s 2011 Ford Fiesta was totaled. Should we accept a $2,000 insurance settlement or give up the car for $2,700?
items.description: “The hood is bent, the radiator is cracked, and the front bumper is destroyed.”

items.title: This Wall Street ‘theme-o-meter’ has a clear message: The artificial-intelligence bull market is back
items.description: UBS says its top theme right now is that leadership for artificial-intelligence stocks is returning, and earnings season may prove how investors have been too pessimistic.

items.title: Wholesale prices show first drop in almost a year on lower gas prices, but inflation still too high
items.description: Wholesale prices fell in June for the first time in 10 months largely due to lower gas prices, but it’s unclear if the recent slowdown in inflation will  persist in light of renewed hostilities betwee

items.title: BlackRock profits jump as assets under management hit a record $15 trillion
items.description: Shares in the fund manager rise as company says its will boost quarterly buybacks to $550 million

items.title: Skip the lettuce, cook your other greens and more advice on avoiding cyclosporiasis
items.description: The outbreak of cyclosporiasis, which causes diarrhea, has sickened about 6,700 people since May.

items.title: I’m 67 with a $140,000 pension. Should I wait until 70 to claim Social Security so my wife gets more?
items.description: “When I pass, all my retirement income is reduced to $30,000 a year.”

items.title: SpaceX ushered in a ‘new era’ for investing in space. Why the stock is now cratering.
items.description: After surging in May, the space sector has tumbled as investors are feeling an “investment coma” in the wake of the record-breaking SpaceX IPO.

items.title: Netflix earnings are coming. Here’s what’s needed to prop up the tumbling stock.
items.description: Netflix reports quarterly earnings on Thursday. The streaming platform’s stock has dropped more than 40% over the past year.

items.title: Industrials could be the next big bottleneck trade. Here are some stocks that could benefit.
items.description: The next big bottleneck trade might have more to do with bearings than microchips.
